channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [动画][CAST] Anime News Network Chainsmoker Cat 动画 Casts Niina Nakabayashi
item.description: Nakabayashi plays Jikaki Neko in 4th episode on Thursday ― The staff of the television anime of Nyan Nyan Factory's Chainsmoker Cat (Yanineko) manga revealed on Wednesday that Niina Nakabayashi plays... | 来源: ANN | 原文: Chainsmoker Cat Anime Casts Niina Nakabayashi
